examples: Slouching not only makes you look less attractive, it can also affect your health.
Notice your mood, your energy levels, how your body feels, if you are frowning or slouching.
Also, at all costs avoid the slouching shoulders or bad posture for that can ruin your picture.
Experts say slouching can reduce the capacity of your lungs by as much as 30%.
Her last painting was of you, slouching against the front door: only your frowning I-had-a-lousy-Third-World-childhood-and-all-I-got-was-this-attitude eyes recognizable.
